name: Transaction Intelligence Agent
description: Provides access to sanctions lists, transaction patterns, customer profiles, SAR drafts, and raw wire transfer data for AML compliance orchestration.

scopes.aml-analyst: Access customer profiles for AML analysis (PII, GDPR-regulated)
scopes.compliance-officer: Access SAR drafts and raw wire transfers (restricted)

skills.name: Sanctions Screening
skills.description: Screen entities against OFAC, EU, and UN sanctions lists. Match names, aliases, and corporate structures.
examples: Screen 'Meridian Holdings Ltd' against all sanctions lists
Check for fuzzy name matches on the OFAC SDN list

skills.name: Transaction Analysis
skills.description: Analyse transaction patterns for suspicious activity indicators: structuring, layering, rapid movement, geographic anomalies.
examples: Show geographic distribution of wire transfers over 100K EUR

skills.name: SAR Preparation
skills.description: Assist compliance officers in drafting Suspicious Activity Reports with supporting evidence and regulatory citations.
examples: Draft SAR narrative for case AML-2026-0042
Compile transaction evidence supporting SAR filing
